summary: Phase 3.6b Legal pages rebuild – Frontend-only testing. Tested all 10 requirements: Impressum structured cards, AGB/Datenschutz without dev-banners, tab navigation, public pages (no pastel), footer (no text-blue-*), ScrollToTop. All 10 checks passed. Previous amber AccordionSection issue (iteration 3) is confirmed FIXED – no amber classes on any legal page.
critical_code_review_comments: LegalPage.js: §5 AGB has [OFFEN] marker in content → isOffen=true → border-slate-200 (slightly gray border). This is intentional per spec.

LegalPage.js: 'Hinweis zur rechtlichen Prüfung' section has [OFFEN] and is shown in accordion (last item in Impressum). [OFFEN] inline badges render as small slate-100 boxes with AlertCircle icon – clean and not distracting.
Footer correctly uses text-white/70 and text-white/40 opacity variants (not text-blue-*)

test_credentials.note: No auth required for public legal pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.6b Legal pages are fully working. All previous amber color issues (iteration 3) are now fixed. Impressum shows structured 2-column card with all company data visible without clicking. AGB has §1-§16 accordions, Stand: 06.02.2026. Datenschutz has sections 1-10, Stand: Februar 2026. No dev-banners anywhere. Tab navigation and ScrollToTop both work. Public pages (courses, services, contact) have no pastel colors. Footer is bg-primary with text-white/70 (no text-blue-*).
passed_checks: Impressum (/legal): Structured card 'Angaben gemäß § 5 TMG' directly visible (no accordion-only)
Impressum (/legal): 'Unterrichts- und Beratungsstandort' card directly visible
Impressum: W2G Academy GmbH, Theaterstraße 24, Laura Saboor, HRB 23610 all visible WITHOUT clicking
Impressum: Theaterstraße 30-32 visible as separate Beratungsstandort card
AGB (/agb): No 'Quelle:' banner – 16 paragraph accordions §1-§16 only
Datenschutz (/privacy): No 'Basis:' banner – 10 accordion sections only
Tab navigation: Impressum / AGB / Datenschutz tabs switch correctly between /legal, /agb, /privacy
Tab active state: current tab highlighted with bg-primary
/courses: no bg-green, no bg-amber, no text-blue-* in footer
Footer: text-white/* throughout (no text-blue-* classes found)
ScrollToTop: scrolled from 1780px on /courses to 0px after navigating to /legal
No amber color classes on any legal page (previous issue fully fixed)
